hunters_shot.name: Hunter's Shot
hunters_shot.description: Setup/Builder: A precise arrow to track the prey. Generates 20 Stamina and 1 Mark Pip.

trap_setting.name: Trap Setting
trap_setting.description: Setup: Place an invisible lure. Generates 1 Mark Pip and applies [Marked] when triggered.

predator_strike.name: Predator Strike
predator_strike.description: Payoff: A strike that exploits every weakness. Consumes 5 Mark Pips to deal Physical damage. 100% bonus damage vs [Marked] targets.

rain_of_thorns.name: Rain of Thorns
rain_of_thorns.description: Payoff/AOE: Arrows that splinter on impact. Consumes 3 Mark Pips to deal AOE damage and apply [Bleeding].

beast_hide_cloak.name: Beast-Hide Cloak
beast_hide_cloak.description: Defense: Cloak yourself and your companion in shadows. Grants [Concealed] to both for 6 ticks.

wild_evasion.name: Wild Evasion
wild_evasion.description: Defense: Move with animal instincts. Increases Evasion by 40% and breaks [Rooted] effects.

trek.name: Trek
trek.description: Mobility: Fast travel between known natural landmarks.

call_of_the_wild.name: Call of the Wild
call_of_the_wild.description: Utility/Signature: Summon a temporary pack of wolves to attack your target for 15 ticks.

hunter_physiology.name: Hunter Physiology
hunter_physiology.description: Passive: Master Tracker. You gain 20% bonus damage against beasts and your [Marked] effects never expire on non-player targets.
